text.title: A/B Testing Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pricing-page hero copy experiment EXP-0142 with SRM-clean output and a Wilson CI strictly above zero.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: PM wants to test new pricing-page hero copy. Hypothesis: lift trial-start conversion rate by >= 5% relative. Sample size from `templates/sample-size.py` = 12k per arm.

section.title: Inputs
Output — experiment-run
